sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: WaFd Inc (WAFD) Stock Price Quote Today & Current Price Chart
feed.summary: This article provides current stock price quotes and a price chart for WaFd Inc (WAFD). It also mentions online trading with a smart investment app from Capital.com.

feed.title: Eaton to establish data center-focused segment
feed.summary: Eaton is establishing a new business segment dedicated to the booming data center market, following its recent $9.5 billion acquisition of Boyd Corp.'s thermal business. Angie McMillin will lead this new global data center segment, which aims to provide cohesive solutions, particularly in liquid cooling, to address the increasing power consumption and heat generation from data centers and AI technologies. This move reflects Eaton's strategic response to growing demand and includes plans for increased production capacity in the U.S.

feed.title: VictoryShares短期債券主動型ETF-USTB-ETF配息狀況
feed.summary: This page provides a detailed dividend history for the VictoryShares Short-Term Bond Active ETF (USTB), listing distribution dates, dividend amounts, and types of capital gains. It also defines key terms like ex-dividend date and record date, offering a comprehensive overview of the ETF's distribution performance.

feed.title: Does Permian Basin Royalty Trust’s (PBT) Lower Payout Signal a Shift in Its Income Narrative?
feed.summary: Permian Basin Royalty Trust (PBT) reported a significant decline in its 2025 revenue and net income, leading to a reduced cash distribution of US$0.010662 per unit. This highlights the trust's direct linkage between operating results and unitholder payouts, emphasizing that investors are betting on cash flow from fixed oil and gas interests rather than traditional growth. While the market's recent unit price strength suggests the earnings miss wasn't entirely unexpected, the lower payout underscores the volatility and sustainability risks associated with PBT's distributions.

feed.title: MarketAxess Stock: Leader in Electronic Credit Trading Faces Evolving Fixed Income Landscape
feed.summary: MarketAxess Holdings Inc. (MKTX) leads electronic credit trading for institutional investors, leveraging a robust platform for corporate bonds and other fixed income products. The company benefits from the ongoing digitization of fixed income markets, offering stable recurring revenue and strong competitive differentiation through AI-powered tools and data services. Key risks include interest rate normalization, regulatory changes, and increasing competition, while macro tailwinds and expansion into new asset classes present growth opportunities for North American investors.

feed.title: UDR Inc Stock: Multifamily REIT Leader with Premium Valuation and Steady Dividend Appeal for North American Investors
feed.summary: UDR Inc (NYSE: UDR) is highlighted as a leading multifamily residential REIT with a strong position in high-demand U.S. markets, offering a 3.02% dividend yield. The company's strategy focuses on acquiring, developing, and redeveloping Class A and A- properties in key coastal and high-growth urban areas. This report details UDR's business model, competitive advantages, financial metrics, and investor relevance, while also outlining potential risks and watchpoints for 2026.

feed.title: Easter dinner and basket staples get cheaper at Kroger this week
feed.summary: Kroger (NYSE: KR) is running an Easter and Spring savings event across its stores and online, offering deals on meal staples like ham for $0.85/lb and asparagus for $1.99/lb, plus various basket fillers and floral arrangements. Customers can also earn 4X fuel points through April 7 and utilize pickup, delivery, and third-party delivery services. The promotions aim to provide value to shoppers during the holiday season, with prices valid starting April 1, 2026.

feed.title: Hilton will post Q1 results before the bell on April 28, then take questions
feed.summary: Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. (NYSE: HLT) announced it will report its first-quarter 2026 financial results before the market opens on Tuesday, April 28, 2026. A conference call will follow at 9 a.m. EDT, featuring President & CEO Christopher J. Nassetta and CFO Kevin Jacobs to discuss performance and conduct a Q&A session. Investors can access the live webcast or a replay via Hilton's Investor Relations website.

feed.title: John Deere partners with Major League Baseball
feed.summary: John Deere has announced a new multiyear Major League Baseball (MLB) sponsorship, bringing together two key American institutions. This partnership will highlight the work involved in maintaining backyards and ballfields through multimedia advertising, including on-site activations at the 2026 MLB at Field of Dreams game and MLB All-Star Week. Both brands emphasize their deep connection to American life and communities.

feed.title: Teledyne Marine, Part of Teledyne Technologies Incorporated Receives Contract from Uk Royal Navy for Autonomous Underwater Vehicles and Floats
feed.summary: Teledyne Marine, a division of Teledyne Technologies Incorporated, has secured a contract from the UK Ministry of Defence to supply autonomous ocean observing systems to the Royal Navy. This agreement will enhance the Royal Navy's capabilities in collecting oceanographic and environmental data, supporting operational planning and maritime safety. The contract includes the provision of Sentinel and Slocum gliders, APEX floats, and related services, building on Teledyne's existing support for the Royal Navy's unmanned systems since 2015.

feed.title: Uber deepens WeRide bet as driverless robotaxis hit Dubai
feed.summary: Uber is increasing its equity stake in Chinese self-driving startup WeRide and launching fully driverless robotaxi operations in Dubai, marking its first commercial deployment without human safety drivers in the Middle East. This move signifies Uber's "partner-first" autonomous strategy after selling its own self-driving unit, leveraging WeRide's extensive experience in China. Dubai, with its proactive embrace of autonomous technology, serves as a crucial testing ground for both companies' broader Middle East expansion plans, potentially reshaping Uber's business model for higher profit margins in the long term.

feed.title: Silicon Valley company buys former 3M campus in Austin
feed.summary: A Silicon Valley company, SB Energy, has purchased the former 3M campus in Northwest Austin, now known as Highpoint 2222. The 1.1-million-square-foot property, redeveloped by Karlin Real Estate, was originally intended to be a life sciences campus. It remains unclear if the acquisition by SB Energy is related to the Stargate AI venture.

feed.title: Inside look at San Francisco's bid to split with PG&E
feed.summary: San Francisco's effort to replace PG&E with a publicly owned power utility is gaining momentum, fueled by frustration over a major December blackout and a state directive for PG&E to set a justifiable price for the city to acquire its grid. The city, led by Supervisor Matt Dorsey and City Attorney David Chiu, believes a municipal utility would improve reliability and safety, citing past outages and the fire at PG&E’s Mission substation, while PG&E argues the city lacks the necessary experience. The Public Utilities Commission has set deadlines for both sides to present their offers and appraisals, suggesting a potentially high cost for the city's takeover.

feed.title: Anti-union push grows at Wells Fargo
feed.summary: Wells Fargo is experiencing an increasing anti-union sentiment, with three branches moving to decertify union representation, and one has already succeeded. While the bank is "pleased employees are able to exercise their voice," a union representative attributes this to an "aggressive campaign of union-busting." The National Right to Work Legal Defense Foundation is assisting employees in these efforts, claiming unions often make unfulfilled promises, while a professor notes that decertification is quite rare.

feed.title: T. Rowe Price Names Bill Cashel as Head of Alternatives for U.S. Wealth
feed.summary: T. Rowe Price has announced the appointment of Bill Cashel as Head of Alternatives for U.S. Wealth, a strategic move as the firm expands its private markets and alternative offerings. Cashel will focus on collaborating with sales teams and senior leaders across T. Rowe Price and Oak Hill Advisors to develop and deliver alternative and private market investment capabilities to wealth advisors and investors. His extensive experience in alternative investments, including his previous roles at AQR Capital Management and co-founding Privacore Capital, is expected to significantly enhance T. Rowe Price's ability to provide differentiated solutions.

feed.title: Guarantor: JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC, guaranteed by JPMorgan Chase & Co., has issued Auto Callable Contingent Interest Notes linked to the S&P 500® Index and the Russell 2000® Index, with a due date of October 5, 2026. These notes offer contingent interest payments if both indices perform above a specified barrier, and are subject to automatic call if both indices are above their strike values on review dates. Investors face risks including potential loss of principal and credit risk of both the issuer and guarantor.

feed.title: Vivani Medical price target lowered to $3.50 from $4 at H.C. Wainwright
feed.summary: H.C. Wainwright analyst Yi Chen lowered the price target for Vivani Medical (VANI) to $3.50 from $4, while maintaining a Buy rating. This adjustment was made after the company reported its 2025 results, with the analyst citing an increased share count as the reason for the reduced target. Despite the target reduction, H.C. Wainwright believes Vivani Medical's NPM-139 has the potential to offer efficacy comparable to Wegovy with less frequent administration.

feed.title: Xcel Energy to deliver more than $130 million to Upper Midwest customers from nuclear energy tax credit
feed.summary: Xcel Energy will deliver over $130 million in additional savings to its Upper Midwest customers, stemming from federal tax credits for its nuclear energy production. This brings the total savings to over $330 million in the first two years of the credits, distributed as monthly refunds to customers in Minnesota, North Dakota, and South Dakota, and integrated into rates for Wisconsin and Michigan customers. The company highlighted that its Monticello and Prairie Island nuclear plants are crucial for regional energy security, providing carbon-free,baseload power, and contributing to economic growth and reliable electricity.

feed.title: Revvity (NYSE:RVTY) Price Target Cut to $96.00 by Analysts at JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. analysts have cut their price target for Revvity (NYSE:RVTY) from $105.00 to $96.00, maintaining a "neutral" rating with a potential upside of 11.61%. Despite this, the stock has a consensus "Hold" rating from multiple analysts, with an average target price of $112.92. Revvity recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating EPS estimates and setting optimistic FY2026 guidance.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Cuts Vipshop (NYSE:VIPS) Price Target to $21.00
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has lowered its price target for Vipshop (NYSE:VIPS) from $22.00 to $21.00 but maintained an "overweight" rating, suggesting a significant upside. Despite the slight target reduction, the stock continues to hold a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating among analysts. Vipshop shares experienced a slight downturn, trading at $15.54 with a market capitalization of $7.96 billion.

feed.title: Tradr 2X Short TSLA Daily ETF
feed.summary: This page provides a detailed profile of the Tradr 2X Short TSLA Daily ETF (TSLQ), an inverse equity ETF designed to track the inverse performance of Tesla Inc. It includes current pricing, expense ratios, holdings, performance data, technical analysis, and comparisons to other inverse equity ETFs. The ETF aims to provide 2x short exposure to TSLA's daily returns.

feed.title: TE Connectivity (TEL): Jefferies Lowers Price Target Amidst Continued Buy Rating | TEL Stock News
feed.summary: Jefferies analyst Alex Dwyer has lowered the price target for TE Connectivity (TEL) from $280.00 to $250.00, while maintaining a "Buy" rating. This adjustment comes amidst varied analyst outlooks, with other firms like Oppenheimer, Barclays, and Wells Fargo also updating their price targets recently. Despite the target reduction by Jefferies, the average target price from 20 analysts still suggests a potential upside of 33.43% for the stock.

feed.title: Delta flight to Atlanta returns to Brazil airport after engine issue
feed.summary: A Delta Air Lines flight bound for Atlanta returned to São Paulo, Brazil, shortly after takeoff due to an engine issue. The Airbus A330-300, carrying 272 passengers and 14 crew members, landed safely with no injuries reported. Brazilian media suggested a passenger video showed the left engine failing, although this has not been independently verified.

feed.title: Exclusive: Pfizer to shutter South S.F. research site, end Bay Area presence
feed.summary: Pfizer is closing its South San Francisco research site and corporate office by the end of April, signaling an end to its Bay Area presence due to underutilized space. While Pfizer states it maintains a strong presence in California, particularly in San Diego, this move raises questions about the region's post-pandemic life sciences economy, which is facing headwinds including reduced funding and high operating costs. The closure follows Pfizer's 2022 acquisition of Global Blood Therapeutics, which was headquartered at the South San Francisco site, and comes amid broader cutbacks in the Bay Area biotech sector.

feed.title: Piper Sandler Adjusts Price Target for CVS Health (CVS) to $99
feed.summary: Piper Sandler has reiterated an "Overweight" rating for CVS Health (CVS) but reduced its price target from $101 to $99. This adjustment follows several other recent analyst updates, including both upgrades and downgrades, with an average target price among 26 analysts of $93.79, indicating a potential 31.54% upside from the current price. CVS Health operates diverse healthcare services, including retail pharmacies, a pharmacy benefit manager, a health insurer, and primary care services.

feed.title: Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. Stock: Navigating AI Momentum and Semiconductor Headwinds in 2026
feed.summary: Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. (AMD) is at the forefront of the semiconductor industry, driven by AI and data center innovations, with a market capitalization exceeding $300 billion. The company reported robust revenue growth in Q4 2025, fueled by data center demand and strategic AI partnerships. While facing cyclical semiconductor demand and competitive challenges, AMD's innovation in product portfolio and strategic capacity expansions position it for continued growth in the AI sector.

feed.title: Dow rallies nearly 500 points on gains for shares of NVIDIA Corp., Caterpillar
feed.summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average rallied nearly 500 points, driven by strong performances from NVIDIA Corp. and Caterpillar. This gain indicates positive market sentiment and notable upward movement for key industrial and technology stocks.

feed.title: Vestand (NASDAQ: VSTD) delays 2025 10-K filing amid restatement
feed.summary: Vestand Inc. (NASDAQ: VSTD) has announced a delay in its 2025 10-K annual report filing due to an ongoing restatement of previously issued financial statements from September 30, 2022, through June 30, 2025. This restatement follows an Audit Committee Report and an Independent Accountant’s Report on Applying Agreed-Upon Procedures, and while financial impacts for 2025 are expected, they are not yet determined. The company plans to file the report as soon as the restatement is complete.

feed.title: Xylem (XYL): Jefferies Lowers Price Target, Maintains Hold Ratin
feed.summary: Jefferies has lowered its price target for Xylem (XYL) from $140 to $130, while maintaining a Hold rating. This decision follows previous adjustments from other analysts who also reduced price targets but largely kept Buy or Outperform ratings. Xylem, a global leader in water technology, still shows an average analyst target price of $156.33, implying a significant upside from its current trading price.

feed.title: The Goldman Sachs Group stock: Investment banking powerhouse navigates market cycles with resilient
feed.summary: The Goldman Sachs Group, a global leader in investment banking, trading, and asset management, showcases its resilience and adaptability through a diversified business model and strategic focus. For North American investors, GS offers exposure to capital markets and wealth management, benefiting from its strong performance in M&A advisory, robust capital ratios, and strategic investments in technology and sustainable finance while navigating market cycles with a focus on risk mitigation and financial stability. Despite potential market downturns and regulatory scrutiny, the firm's strategic initiatives and core strengths position it favorably for continued growth, making it a key holding for macro-aware investors.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase American Dream Push Highlights Small Business And Valuation Story
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase has launched its American Dream Initiative, a program dedicated to US small businesses that includes nearly US$80 billion in new lending over ten years and the hiring of about 1,000 new small business bankers. This initiative reinforces the bank's focus on small business banking, a key part of its consumer and commercial franchise. The move comes as JPMorgan Chase's shares are trading below analyst targets and its estimated fair value, despite a profitable current state.

feed.title: Esousa Group and Michael Wachs disclose 9.9% stake in VCI Global (VCIG)
feed.summary: Esousa Group Holdings LLC and Michael Wachs have disclosed a 9.9% beneficial ownership stake in VCI Global Ltd (VCIG), amounting to 225,241 ordinary shares, as detailed in a Schedule 13G filing. This ownership is subject to a Beneficial Ownership Limitation preventing them from exceeding 9.9%, even though they hold warrants for additional shares. The filing highlights their sole voting and dispositive power over the reported shares, emphasizing the passive nature of this investment due to the ownership cap.

feed.title: McDonald’s shuffles its leadership team
feed.summary: McDonald's has announced several leadership changes, appointing Skye Anderson as chief operating officer of the U.S. system and Mason Smoot as senior vice president of global franchising and delivery. These changes are intended to build on the company's momentum and drive growth, execution, and enterprise transformation. Additionally, Mattijs Backx has been promoted to chief transformation & services officer, and Tabassum Zalotrawala was recently promoted to senior vice president, global restaurant development and design.

feed.title: Linde plc Stock: Industrial Gases Leader with Strong Market Position and Growth Outlook for Investor
feed.summary: Linde plc, a global leader in industrial gases, maintains robust demand due to its pivotal role in clean energy and manufacturing sectors. The company's strong market position, extensive U.S. operations, and stable dividend profile make it an attractive investment for North American investors seeking stability and exposure to megatrends like decarbonization. Despite potential risks from energy price volatility and geopolitical tensions, Linde's financial health and strategic advantages position it for continued growth.

feed.title: Palantir Technologies Inc Stock (PLTR) Moved Up by 3.40% on Mar 31: A Full Analysis
feed.summary: Palantir Technologies Inc (PLTR) saw its stock price rise by 3.40% on March 31, driven by expanded partnerships, including a significant renewal with Stellantis, and increased adoption of its Artificial Intelligence Platform (AIP). Optimistic analyst ratings citing strong enterprise demand and robust financial performance in Q4 2025 further bolstered investor confidence. The company's strategic importance in the defense sector, particularly with its Maven AI system, also remains a key growth catalyst despite concerns about valuation and insider selling.

feed.title: Intel Corp Stock (INTC) Moved Up by 3.27% on Mar 31: What Investors Need To Know
feed.summary: Intel Corp (INTC) saw its stock price increase by 3.27% on March 31, driven by the launch of its Core Ultra Series 3 commercial PC chips on 18A process technology and an expanded partnership with CrowdStrike for AI PC security. These developments, which showcase Intel's manufacturing capabilities and strategic advancements in its foundry ambitions, appear to have overshadowed earlier concerns about its Q1 2026 guidance and operating losses in its foundry unit. The market is focusing on the execution of the 18A manufacturing process and new product rollouts as key indicators of the company's long-term turnaround.

feed.title: RTX F135 Win Deepens F 35 Ties And Long Term Defense Exposure
feed.summary: RTX, through its subsidiary Pratt & Whitney, secured a substantial contract modification for F135 engines for the global F-35 Joint Strike Fighter program, strengthening its position in long-term defense. This multi-year award will influence RTX's revenue mix and capital spending as production capacity increases to meet demand. While the stock has shown strong long-term returns, recent momentum indicates some weakness despite this contract win, and RTX carries a high level of debt.

feed.title: Packaging Corp of America Stock: Steady Containerboard Leader Faces Sector Headwinds in 2026
feed.summary: Packaging Corp of America (PKG) is a leading North American producer of containerboard and paper products, known for long-term shareholder value and consistent dividends. Despite its strong market position and benefits from e-commerce growth, the company faces potential headwinds in 2026 due to cyclical demand, raw material price swings, and intense competition. Investors are closely watching the upcoming Q1 2026 results for insights into demand and margin outlook.

feed.title: The Mosaic Company (MOS) Declined on Mixed Earnings Despite Tight Phosphate Market Outlook
feed.summary: Ariel Focus Fund's Q4 2025 investor letter highlighted The Mosaic Company (NYSE:MOS), noting its stock declined due to mixed earnings and management commentary that fell short of expectations. Despite higher potash and phosphate prices, lower volumes and rising production costs impacted performance. However, the fund expects phosphate markets to remain tight and MOS to focus on cost discipline and returning capital to shareholders.

feed.title: Toyota Moves to Join Volvo Group, Daimler Truck in Fuel Cell Joint Venture cellcentric
feed.summary: Toyota Motor Corporation is looking to become an equal shareholder in cellcentric, a joint venture established by Volvo Group and Daimler Truck to develop hydrogen fuel cell systems for heavy-duty commercial vehicles. This partnership aims to combine expertise to scale fuel cell technology and accelerate its commercialization, particularly for long-haul and high-utilization fleet applications where battery-electric solutions may be less suitable. The move signifies increasing industry collaboration and a strengthening role for hydrogen in decarbonizing heavy-duty transport.

feed.title: Cisco Systems Inc Stock (CSCO) Moved Down by 4.40% on Mar 31: Facts Behind the Movement
feed.summary: Cisco Systems Inc. (CSCO) stock declined 4.40% on March 31, driven by analyst concerns over market share loss and gross margin pressures, coupled with executive stock sales indicating a cautious internal outlook. Broader market downturns due to inflation and geopolitical tensions further exacerbated the stock's negative performance. Despite some positive developments, company-specific risks like supply chain issues and integration challenges with Splunk continue to pose headwinds.

feed.title: Smith & Wesson Brands unveils Shield X with upgraded performance features
feed.summary: Smith & Wesson Brands has launched the Shield X, an exclusive compact firearm for the @galleryofguns platform, featuring Performance Center upgrades to enhance speed, control, and consistency. This release continues the company's tradition of specialized firearm production, following the introduction of compensator-fitted MP M2.0 pistols and historical contracts providing custom Model 41 pistols to the U.S. Air Force. The Shield X is designed to meet demanding operational requirements, appealing to users seeking both technical excellence and reliability.

feed.title: PEP.SW PepsiCo (SIX) +6.84% after hours 31 Mar 2026: volume spike signals renewed trading interest
feed.summary: PepsiCo (PEP.SW) saw a significant after-hours surge of 6.84% on March 31, 2026, reaching CHF125.00, driven by a substantial volume spike signaling renewed institutional interest. While fundamentals show healthy margins and cash flow, the stock exhibits high leverage and a valuation slightly above the sector average. Meyka AI gives PEP.SW a "B+" grade with a "BUY" suggestion, despite forecasting a potential downside in its 1-year price model.

feed.title: Assessing DTE Energy (DTE) Valuation After Recent Share Price Strength And Capital Spending Plans
feed.summary: DTE Energy (DTE) has seen its share price rise by 12.0% year-to-date and is assessed as undervalued by Simply Wall St's narrative model, trading at a 1.9% discount to its intrinsic estimate and a 6.1% discount to analyst targets. The company's $30 billion multi-year capital plan, focused on grid modernization, is expected to drive long-term earnings stability. While its P/E ratio is higher than the broader industry, it's lower than peers and its fair ratio, presenting a mixed valuation picture with both potential opportunities and risks.

feed.title: KKR plans to privatise Japan's Taiyo Holdings with $3.3 billion tender offer
feed.summary: Global investment firm KKR intends to make a tender offer to acquire all shares of Japanese chemical manufacturer Taiyo Holdings for 528.56 billion yen ($3.33 billion), or 4,750 yen per share. KKR has secured support for the privatization from major shareholders DIC Corp, Kowa Co, and Oasis Management, who collectively own 42.2% of Taiyo's outstanding shares. The founding family plans to re-invest in the KKR-managed investment vehicle that will control Taiyo Holdings.

feed.title: Abbott Oncology Integration Into OncoEMR Tests Long Term Growth Story
feed.summary: Abbott Laboratories is integrating its Precision Oncology portfolio into Flatiron Health's OncoEMR platform, aiming to simplify cancer diagnostics for clinicians across 1,600+ U.S. community cancer centers. This move follows Abbott's expansion into cancer diagnostics through its Exact Sciences deal and seeks to improve distribution and workflow integration of its oncology tests. Investors will need to watch clinician adoption and the overall impact on Abbott's long-term growth story, especially considering mixed past share price performance.

feed.title: ROL Stock: Technology and Strategic Expansion Support Stability
feed.summary: Rollins Inc. (ROL) is strengthening its position in the global pest management industry through significant investments in technology, disciplined acquisitions, and a strong financial standing. While these strategies support long-term growth and consistent dividend payouts, the company faces challenges such as rising operating costs and integration risks from its aggressive acquisition strategy. Rollins currently holds a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold), suggesting a balanced outlook for investors who should monitor how the company addresses these operational pressures.

feed.title: AMD's Gaming Revenues Set to Decelerate: What's the Path Ahead?
feed.summary: AMD's gaming revenues are expected to decelerate despite a 50% jump in Q4, driven by higher semi-custom sales and strong GPU demand. The company anticipates a significant double-digit decline in semi-custom SoC annual revenues by 2026, impacting gaming. AMD faces tough competition from NVIDIA and Intel, although new product launches and future collaborations, like the next-gen Xbox, offer potential for growth.

feed.title: FactSet Research Systems Q2 Earnings Call Highlights
feed.summary: FactSet Research Systems (NYSE: FDS) reported strong Q2 fiscal 2026 results, showing accelerated organic ASV growth across all regions and client types, driven by asset management and dealmakers. The company emphasized AI's dual role as both a demand driver and an efficiency lever, leading to product traction and significant internal productivity gains. FactSet also raised its fiscal 2026 guidance for ASV, revenue, and EPS, maintaining operating margin, and accelerated share repurchases.

feed.title: VenHub Global, Inc. announces an Equity Buyback for 984,579 shares, representing 6% of its issued share capital.
feed.summary: VenHub Global, Inc. (NasdaqGM:VHUB) has announced a share repurchase program. The company plans to buy back up to 984,579 shares, which constitutes 6% of its issued share capital, with the program valid until April 30, 2028. This move aims to provide effective capital management, increase return on equity for existing shareholders, and enhance market liquidity for its common shares.
